label: Apparel layer
description: Defines a clothing layer slot for pawn rendering. Each apparel item declares which layers it occupies. Higher drawOrder values are drawn on top of lower ones.

drawOrder.label: Draw order
drawOrder.description: Z-order for this layer relative to other apparel layers during pawn rendering. Higher values are drawn on top. Shipped Core layers use multiples of 100.

new-apparel-layer.label: New apparel layer
new-apparel-layer.description: Minimal apparel layer with a draw order value.
